# ChongGrok AI Membership Guides

> Unified directory for independent ChatGPT, SuperGrok, Claude and Gemini membership subscription, payment troubleshooting and account-status guides. ChongGrok is not affiliated with OpenAI, xAI, X, Anthropic or Google.

## Primary directory

- Knowledge hub: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/
- Search: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/search/
- Service boundaries: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/about/
- English directory: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/en/
- Bilingual AI membership safety checklist: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/resources/ai-membership-safety-checklist/
- English safety checklist: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/en/resources/ai-membership-safety-checklist/

## ChatGPT guide

- Main guide: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/chatgpt-plus-pro-china-guide/

- Renewal failed and back to Free: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/chatgpt-plus-pro-china-guide/guides/chatgpt-renewal-failed-back-to-free/

## Primary service pages

- ChongGrok: https://chonggrok.com/
- ChatGPT membership: https://chonggrok.com/chatgpt
- SuperGrok membership: https://chonggrok.com/supergrok
- Claude membership: https://chonggrok.com/claude
- Card-key verification: https://chonggrok.com/verify

## Scope and safety

- Membership subscriptions only; no API credits.
- No ready-made accounts, SMS verification or bulk registration.
- Passwords, email verification codes and recovery codes are not requested.
- ChatGPT session credentials are sensitive and should be refreshed after completion.
- Grok and Claude User IDs are account identifiers, not passwords, but they should still be handled carefully.
- Gemini assistance is limited to the user's own Google account; required information is confirmed case by case and no fixed credential is claimed.
- No online service is risk-free; no guaranteed account outcome is claimed.
